description: Tabular AutoGluon pipeline: load and split data, train and refit models, build leaderboard.

components.description: Load tabular data, sample, cleanse, split, and write train/validation outputs.

stages.description: Validate pipeline inputs, split config, and sampling parameters.
Read source data and apply sampling strategy.
Apply cleansing rules to the sampled dataset.
Split data into selection train/validation sets.
Write train/validation CSVs and metadata to the workspace.

components.description: Train AutoGluon tabular models, refit, and evaluate on validation data.

stages.description: Load train/validation CSVs from the workspace.
Run AutoGluon model selection (fit) with presets and time limits.
Refit the best models on combined train+validation data.
Evaluate refit models and write metrics artifacts.

components.description: Build the AutoML leaderboard HTML from per-model metrics.

stages.description: Aggregate model metrics, rank models, and render leaderboard HTML.
